Bash(powershell -File - <<'PSEOF'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
$zipPath = "C:\\Users\\ishla\\Desktop\\SEO ACTUAL PLAYGROUND PLUGIN\\SEO_Playground_Plugin\\almaseo-seo-playground.zip"
$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zipPath\)
Write-Host "Total entries: $\($zip.Entries.Count\)"
$includesCount = \($zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'includes/' }\).Count
Write-Host "Includes entries: $includesCount"
$zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'includes/' } | Select-Object -First 5 FullName
$zip.Dispose\(\)
PSEOF)
